allow: PowerShell($pages = 'index.html','network.html','communities.html','messages.html','resources.html','events.html','jobs.html'; foreach \($p in $pages\) { try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8000/$p" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; "{0,-22} {1} \({2:N0} bytes\)" -f $p, $r.StatusCode, $r.Content.Length } catch { "{0,-22} ERR: {1}" -f $p, $_.Exception.Message } })
